rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract content, with type scopes for constants and equations, and implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers and avoid AADL property names as variables.
Write assumptions and guarantees using visible feature names and concrete bounds when available.
Relate outputs to inputs in type-level contracts without relying on implementation-only paths.
Validate that declared types match expression types to prevent type mismatch errors.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use eq for equation declarations, const for constants, assume/guarantee for contract statements, and assign for implementation-level bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Avoid referencing AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables.
